name: Cannelloni with Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Marinara Sauce, prepared as directed
1 cup White Sauce, prepared as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. To make filling, combine browned beef, browned sausage, sautéed onion and Marinara Sauce.
2. Cook cannelloni as directed, but cook for only 3/4 of the recommended time; rinse and drain.
3. Fill cannelloni with filling mixture and pack firmly into greased baking dish.
4. To make cheese sauce, warm white sauce until nearly boiling; add grated cheddar cheese and stir until melted.
5. Pour cheese sauce over cannelloni, coating pasta generously.
6. Cool.
7. To freeze: cover baking dish with aluminum foil; place in freezer bag. Label and freeze.
8. To prepare: uncover and bake frozen casserole in a 400-degree oven for 1 hour, or until hot and bubbling. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese, return to oven for 5 minutes to brown top.
Serving Ideas: Green Salad, Fresh French Bread
Notes: If making Macaroni and Cheese with Ham in the same cooking session, make cheese sauce only once, dividing it to top Cannelloni and to make Macaroni and Cheese.
